productDisplayName: Puma Unisex White  Snova Sequence 4M Backpack
description: With its durable construction and generous storage, this puma Big cat Backpack is great for on-the-go convenience and easy style. Length: 45 cm  Made of 90% polyester and 10% nylon for durability One main compartment with a two-way zipper, and has a zippered pouch insideFront zippered compartment with an embroidered and printed puma Jumping Cat logoWide padded and adjustable shoulder straps for carrying easeCare only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry Do not iron
